title: Elevate '23 Masterclass 5: Process or projects - How to structure workflows in monday.com
excerpt:
One of the most important aspects of the platform, if not THE most important, is how you structure your workflow in the platform and how you can maximise the features to best suit your workflow needs!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
One of the most important aspects of the platform, if not THE most important, is how you structure your workflow in the platform and how you can maximise the features to best suit your workflow needs!

We want to hear from you - Do you have a monday.com best practice? Share your advice below and let’s help each other build the workflow of our dreams!
